name: Teleconference > Client Meetings > Initial Consultation
taxonomy_path: Labor > Teleconference > Client Meetings > Initial Consultation
basis: Non-field/admin -- confirm with Manny. Initial remote consult (phone/video) to scope a job. ~0.5 hr consult time, flat. Frequently offered free as a sales touch rather than billed; price only if it replaces a paid design/advisory call.
sources: Non-field/admin remote consult; handyman/contractor phone/video consult often free or $40-$75/half hr. No hard market comp - internal rate.

name: Teleconference > Client Meetings > Progress Review
taxonomy_path: Labor > Teleconference > Client Meetings > Progress Review
basis: Non-field/admin -- confirm with Manny. Remote progress review call during an active job. ~0.3 hr, flat. Usually absorbed overhead, not a standalone billed line.
sources: Non-field/admin remote check-in; typically overhead on active jobs. No market comp - internal rate.

name: Teleconference > Technical Consultations > Design Consultation
taxonomy_path: Labor > Teleconference > Technical Consultations > Design Consultation
refer_note: Permit-pulling and licensed design or engineering sit outside handyman scope. We coordinate the right licensed professional.
basis: Non-field/admin -- confirm with Manny. Remote design consult (layout, finish/material advice). ~0.75 hr at reduced advisory rate. VERIFY: keep to informal handyman advice - stamped/professional design is outside an insured handyman's scope; refer to a designer/architect for formal plans.
sources: Non-field advisory; design consult $50-$150/hr for informal layout/finish advice. No hard comp. Handyman is not a licensed designer/architect.

name: Teleconference > Technical Consultations > Engineering Review
taxonomy_path: Labor > Teleconference > Technical Consultations > Engineering Review
refer_note: Permit-pulling and licensed design or engineering sit outside handyman scope. We coordinate the right licensed professional.
basis: Non-field/admin -- confirm with Manny. Remote 'engineering review' as informal feasibility talk only. ~0.75 hr advisory. VERIFY/borderline REFER: an insured handyman cannot render licensed engineering opinions - any true structural/engineering sign-off must go to a licensed PE. Price low as a talk-through only.
sources: Non-field advisory; PE structural review $150-$300/hr if done by a licensed engineer. Handyman cannot provide engineering opinions. No direct comp.
